title: Tulane University
doc_html:
§14.  Tulane University

Section 14.  The Tulane University of Louisiana in New Orleans is recognized as created and to be developed in accordance with Act No. 43 approved July 5, 1884.1

1LSA-R.S. Title 17, Ch. 6 note.

§14.  Tulane University
